Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: McCall is charged with murder when the prime suspect in her dead detective husband's case is found dead.
Video.title: Requiem For Sergeant McCall

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: A police detective aids in solving a series of murders connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.
Video.title: From San Francisco With Love

Video.summary: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison.
Video.title: Any Second Now

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen.
Video.title: Double Exposure

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.
Video.title: Love, Hate And Sporty James

Video.summary: A musician helps search for the assailant of a pregnant woman being kept alive until she can give birth.
Video.title: A Child Is Born

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pose as spouses to investigate the murder of a girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Hunter falls in love with a beautiful professional killer who's connected to an arson case he's investigating.
Video.title: Straight To The Heart

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues
